## Summary

Brief description of the contribution.

Examples:
- Implementation of TD3
- Added prioritized replay option
- Bug fix in SAC update step

---

## Type of Contribution

Please check the relevant option.

- [ ] New reinforcement learning algorithm
- [ ] RL training methodology or feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

---

## Algorithm / Method Reference

If applicable, include the reference paper(s).

Example:

Paper:
https://arxiv.org/abs/1802.09477

Citation:
Fujimoto et al. "Addressing Function Approximation Error in Actor-Critic Methods."

---

## Implementation Notes

Describe any important implementation details.

Include:
- deviations from the original paper
- assumptions made
- design choices specific to this repository

---

## Testing

Please describe how the implementation was tested.

Examples:

- training run completed successfully
- algorithm learns on standard benchmark environments
- unit tests added

Environment(s) tested:

- [ ] CartPole
- [ ] Pendulum
- [ ] Other (specify)

---

## Performance Notes

If relevant, describe approximate performance behaviour.

Exact reproduction of paper results is **not required**, but the implementation should demonstrate reasonable learning behaviour.

---

## Checklist

Before submitting the pull request:

- [ ] Code follows the existing repository structure
- [ ] Code formatted with `black`
- [ ] Tests run successfully (`pytest`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`pylint`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Paper reference included (for algorithms)

---

## Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know.
